headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on PPL, Raises Price Target to $44
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Nicholas Amicucci   maintains PPL (NYSE:PPL) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $43 to $44.
